note: Added 6 tests verifying handshake packets are routed to network only and never injected into smoltcp VirtualDevice. Added pending_rx_count() helper to VirtualDevice for test inspection. Tests cover: initiation not injected, response not injected, full handshake flow, data packets ARE injected (contrast), poll_tunnel routing, and process_inbound_packet classification. All 373 tests pass, clippy clean (pre-existing warnings only).
